name: SetMeasurementMode
title: SetMeasurementMode
description: VT1004/VT1104: It is possible to switch between direct and filtered differential voltage measurement as well as measurement of pin a or b to reference ground (AGND).
VT2816: For the measurement channels (1-12) it is possible to switch between different voltage measurement modes and the current measurement mode.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.description: Modes for VT1004/VT1104 module: Values see eVTSMeasurementMode Modes for VT2816 module: Values see eVTS2816MeasurementMode

description: This example demonstrates how change the measurement mode of a VT1004 channel. By default the voltage is measured between the two input lines A and B. This example shows how to configure a measurement between input line A and the VT1004 module’s AGND.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
